name: standard-prelim-review-control
rationale: Clean intake at standard LTV (62%); no high-LTV trigger; no postal discrepancy; no admin handoff. Standard prelim-review generator fires; broker-facing email contains the standard Snapshot + Risk Factors + Franco-pointer structure. Control case — verifies that dedicated-generator-bypass paths are NOT taken when their trigger conditions are absent.
notes: Single-event sequence. Per Porter framing #3 Phase 4 assertion-shape: standard generator path should be the assertion in Group D control — bypass paths' negative tests vs all D02 control.
